title: Job Opening Hotel Manager at Air India SATS

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Hotel Manager at Air India SATS
jsonLd.description:
We at Air India SATS are looking for an experienced Hotel Manager based out of Ahmedabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Air India SATS:
Air India SATS is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in GDS Systems

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Air India SATS!
